MNUS Customer Specific Operational Flow Order -- LIFTED


Notice Text:

Effective immediately, Maritimes & Northeast (M&N) is lifting all Customer Specific Operational Flow Orders.

 

Please refer to the table below for the effected M&N operational areas, dates, and tolerance percentages:

 

Operational Area

Gas Day March 6

Gas Day March 7 and until further notice

System Wide

No System Wide OFO

No System Wide OFO

Customer Specific

OFO in Effect
No Due Pipe OFO 2% / 500

No OFO

 

 

Please contact your Operations Account Representative if you have any questions.

 



BackPrint
